title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 103.175 - Feasibility of agencies and school district retirees not having joined plan to join — board to study and report
text:
103.175.  Feasibility of agencies and school district retirees not having joined plan to join — board to study and report. — The board shall study and report to the general assembly, on or before December 15, 2003, on the feasibility of including in this plan individuals who are employees of eligible agencies which have not elected to join the plan or who are retirees of school districts.
(L. 1992 H.B. 1574 § 4 subsec. 13, A.L. 2003 S.B. 317)
